data.title: BNB Surpasses 620 USDT with a 2.74% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 02, 2025, 16:26 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 620 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 621.289978 USDT, with a narrowed 2.74% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: ADA briefly broke through 1 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 57.21%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that ADA briefly broke through 1 USDT and is currently trading at 0.9975 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 57.21%.

data.title: Hyperliquid users who long BTC and ETH with 50x leverage have almost cleared their positions, making a profit of $6.83 million in 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, the long positions of 88,510 ETH and 831.57 BTC of "Hyperliquid 50x leverage long BTC and ETH users" have been almost cleared (only 30.92 BTC left), with a profit of $6.83 million in 24 hours. Ten minutes ago, the user withdrew 12.85 million USDC including principal and profit back to the Arbitrum network.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 89,000 USDT with a 4.74% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 02, 2025, 16:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 89,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 89,032.382813 USDT, with a narrowed 4.74% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: President Trump announces a Crypto Strategic Reserve that includes XRP, SOL, and ADA
data.description:
After long weeks of waiting, US President Donald Trump has finally decided to give the crypto industry what it wants the most; a strategic crypto reserve.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-crypto-strategic-reserve-xrp-sol-ada/

data.title: In the past hour, the BTC liquidation of the entire network exceeded 60 million US dollars, and the XRP liquidation exceeded 30 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 175 million US dollars, of which BTC liquidation is 63.1079 million US dollars, XRP liquidation is 31.3510 million US dollars, SOL liquidation is 19.7715 million US dollars, ETH liquidation is 19.5037 million US dollars, and ADA liquidation is 13.0885 million US dollars.

data.title: President Trump says crypto reserve will include SOL, XRP, and ADA
data.description:
The President's language surrounding a Bitcoin strategic reserve has shifted dramatically since his Bitcoin 2024 keynote address.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-says-digital-asset-stockpile-include-sol-xrp-ada?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump directs working group to ‘move forward’ on SOL, XRP, and ADA Crypto Strategic Reserve
data.description:
The announcement notably excludes Bitcoin, which the federal government already holds $17 billion worth.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/344092/trump-directs-working-group-to-move-forward-on-sol-xrp-and-ada-crypto-strategic-reserve?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
